---
name: Directive Feedback
about: Suggest a clarification, addition, or correction to a UX Directive
title: "[Directive Feedback] Chapter X — Short description"
labels: feedback
assignees: ''
---

## Which chapter or directive does this relate to?

> e.g. Chapter 4 — System Behavior & Workflow Logic / Directive 44/03

## What is the current behavior or wording?

> Quote or describe the existing directive, heuristic, or success indicator.

## What is the issue or suggestion?

> Describe what's unclear, missing, or could be improved.

## Proposed change (optional)

> If you have a specific rewrite or addition in mind, share it here.

## Example or context

> Share a design scenario, edge case, or real-world example that motivated this feedback.
